case_title: ELENA QUINONEZ ET AL VS. CHUNWAI NG

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:PLAINTIFF - CRISTINA A. QUINONEZ; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,190.92 FILED BY QUINONEZ, ELENA QUINONEZ, CRISTINA A. AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CHUNWAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: PLAINTIFF'S HONDA REPLACEMENT COST FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, CHUNWAI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINONEZ, ELENA QUINONEZ, CRISTINA A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NG, CHUNWAI PLAINTIFFS HAVE ALREADY RECOVERED THEIR PROPERTY DAMAGES IN FULL; THEY RECEIVED THE VALUE OF THE CAR THEY LOST. TO AWARD THEN THE VALUE OF A NEW CAR WOULD PLACE THEM IN A BETTER POSITION THAN THEY WERE IN BEFORE THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF QUINONEZ, ELENA QUINONEZ, CRISTINA A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF'S ELENA QUINONEZ & CRISTINA QUINONEZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHUNWAI NG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO ELENA QUINONEZ ON 10/04/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CHUNWAI
